> **2026-05-07 — REGEN PENDING.** Thesis bumped v2.9 → v3.0 → v3.1 in cycle 14 (structural cleanup + Phase 4 blind-spot protocol + schema `audience_archetype` upgrade). `thesis-schema.yaml` now carries strengthened `founder_vocabulary` for S3 / S5 / S6 / S7 / S10, an `audience_archetype` field per gap, and a top-level `audience_archetypes` block with per-archetype surface menus. The next invocation of `generate-search-terms` must apply `task-prompts/generate-search-terms-v6-spec.md` (replace L1a–L4e with L0–L10; CNV as free-text terms not exact-match; archetype-typed L2/L3 surfaces). Until that regen runs, **Phase 4 of the radar follows `task-prompts/radar-phase-4-blind-spot-protocol.md` for blind-spot cells** — that protocol is the documented bypass while v5.5 vocabulary remains stale.

## Coverage
- Press: **70** (17 high-priority + 21 country-rotation)
- Innovation hubs: 9 | University spin-outs: 24 | Competitions: 18
- Seed VCs: **117** (110 European-tagged listed in L4b for europe-first gaps)

## Quality gates (applied at scan time)
- max_round_size_usd: $50M | max_age: 90d | min_round: $250k
- chain_exclusion_terms: 26 (Solana, Ethereum, Base network, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, etc.)
